creator: martin@lispworks.com
text:
(In reply to Michael from comment #14)
> GEOM_PART: integrity check failed (ada0s2, EBR)

That means FreeBSD is rejecting the extended partition.  Try adding boot_verbose=1 in /boot/loader.conf and reboot.  Then look in dmesg for GEOM_PART messages above the "integrity check failed" message to see why.

> ada0s2 is an extended partitionand holding s4, s5 and a 8g linux swap partition which doesn't appear

Why do you think the extended partition holds s4?  I think s4 is a primary partition.  The extended partition holds s5 and s6.
